final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing short-video vertical cover image for a gaming monitor product launch, intended for a Douyin / TikTok / Reels short-video cover.

Style/medium: minimalist premium product cover, sleek tech aesthetic
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout — large bold headline anchored in upper third, monitor hero shot centered, tagline in lower third
Subject: GGU gaming monitor, ultra-modern industrial design, facing viewer
Scene/backdrop: dark near-black background with subtle tech-gradient or faint light sweep
Lighting/mood: dramatic single-source highlight on monitor bezel, cool-blue accent glow suggesting speed and precision
Color palette: deep black / charcoal base, electric blue or white accent, high contrast
Materials/textures: glossy monitor surface, metallic stand
Text (verbatim): "8K GGU 电竞显示器 1000Hz" as oversized hero headline; "全球首发 全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as subtitle line
Constraints: vertical 9:16 format, headline must be the dominant visual element and immediately eye-catching, rule-of-thirds composition strictly observed
Avoid: cluttered layout, warm color tones, generic stock-photo style, decorative gradients that reduce readability
